questions.question: What are your hospital hours?
questions.answer: We are open **24/7 for emergency services**. Our general consultation and outpatient departments (OPD) are open from **9:00 AM to 9:00 PM**, Monday through Saturday.

questions.question: How can I book an appointment?
questions.answer: You can book an appointment by clicking the **'MAKE AN APPOINTMENT'** button at the top of our website, or by calling us directly at **xxxxxxxxxx**.

questions.question: Where is Ethique Hospitals located?
questions.answer: We are located at **xxxxxxxxxx**. You can find our exact location on the **'Contact Us'** page, which includes an interactive map for directions.

questions.question: What medical services do you provide?
questions.answer: We offer a wide range of services including **General Medicine, Emergency Care, Lab Services, and Specialized Consultations**. Please visit our **'Services'** page for a full list.

questions.question: Is there 24/7 emergency support?
questions.answer: Yes, Ethique Hospitals provides **24/7 emergency care** and ambulance support. Your health and safety are our top priorities at all times.
